description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the node:lts-alpine Docker image. Add a test-stage job named test that runs on all branches except master, executes "yarn install" then "npx stencil test --spec". Add a deploy-stage job named pages that runs only on the master branch, runs "yarn install", "npm run build", copies the built charts with "cp -R www/ccrpc-charts public", and publishes the "public" directory as a Pages artifact. No services, caches, or extra variables are required.
